title: <ul>
content:
• API Key:YOUR_CRUNCHBASE_API_KEY_HERE
  • Docs:
    https://data.crunchbase.com/docs

9. Yelp Fusion API

Purpose: Find real local businesses by category

  • API Key:YOUR_YELP_API_KEY_HERE
  • Docs:
    https://docs.developer.yelp.com/

10. Data.gov APIs

Purpose: Public datasets (UCC filings in some states, IRS, SBA)

  • API Key:Most datasets require none
  • Docs:
    https://api.data.gov/

11. SBA.gov API

Purpose: Small business registries, PPP/EIDL data

  • API Key:Usually none
  • Docs:
    https://data.sba.gov/

12. IRS Exempt Organizations API

Purpose: Nonprofit business data

  • API Key:None
  • Docs:https://www.irs.gov/charities-non-profits/exempt-organizations-business-master-file

13. UCC State Portals (No unified API, but many allow HTML scraping)
context: From document: data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform — chunk 21 (chunk 21/32)
